description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/alfageme/client-gui-tests:latest. Define a single job named test:addAccount (default stage) that first runs `npm install > /dev/null`, starts a virtual X server with `Xvfb :5 -screen 0 1024x768x24 -fbdir /var/run &`, starts the D-Bus service via `service dbus start`, and launches the ownCloud client with `/owncloud-client/bin/owncloud &`. Then the script executes `node GUI_test.js || true` and converts all generated PNGs into an animated GIF named after the job using `convert -delay 75 -loop 0 *.png $CI_JOB_NAME.gif`. The job stores any resulting `*.gif` files as artifacts. The pipeline has no explicit stages, caches, or rules.
